attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.FROM_ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.TO_ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.SHIP_METHOD, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.TIME_UOM_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.INTRANSIT_TIME, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.DEFAULT_FLAG, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.FROM_LOCATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.TO_LOCATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.LOAD_WEIGHT_UOM_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.VOLUME_UOM_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.CURRENCY_CODE, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.DAILY_LOAD_WEIGHT_CAPACITY, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.COST_PER_UNIT_LOAD_WEIGHT, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.DAILY_VOLUME_CAPACITY, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.COST_PER_UNIT_LOAD_VOLUME, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.TO_REGION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.DESTINATION_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.ORIGIN_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.FROM_REGION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH,
 (
 select  SHIP_METHOD ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH
 minus
 select  SHIP_METHOD ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_MTL_INTERORG_SHIP_METHODS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.SHIP_METHOD = STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.SHIP_METHOD and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_MTL_INTRORG_SHIP_MTH.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_MTL_INTERORG_SHIP_METHODS)
